twitter.copy: Stay hydrated with trust! Bisleri leads the category with 130 operational plants & 5980 distributors. Choose safe, pure, and healthy drinking water for over 50 years! #Bisleri #TrustedWater #Hydrate

instagram.copy: A symbol of trust, purity, and reliability, Bisleri has been a household name in India for decades. With a strong footprint of 130 operational plants, including 13 owned facilities, and a robust distribution network of 5980 distributors and 8270 distribution trucks across India and neighbouring countries, Bisleri leads its category with a promise of delivering safe, pure, and healthy drinking water for over 50 years. Choose Bisleri for your family's well-being! #Bisleri #TrustedWater #HealthyDrinkingWater
